{"cards": [{"name": "Skyward Justiciar", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}{U}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W", "U"], "color_identity": ["W", "U"], "type_line": "Creature — Human Knight", "oracle_text": "Flying
Whenever ~ deals combat damage to a player, you may return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.", "flavor_text": ""Justice strikes swiftly from above, leaving no trace but order in its wake."", "power": "2", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Azorius signpost uncommon that combines white's flying and blue's bounce effects. The triggered ability rewards evasive aggression while providing tempo advantage - classic Azorius gameplay. 2/3 flying for 3 mana is appropriately costed for uncommon, with the bounce ability providing additional value when it connects."}, {"name": "Bloodpact Ravager", "mana_cost": "{3}{B}{R}", "cmc": 5, "colors": ["B", "R"], "color_identity": ["B", "R"], "type_line": "Creature — Demon Berserker", "oracle_text": "Haste
Whenever ~ attacks, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, ~ gets +2/+0 and gains menace until end of turn.
{2}{B}{R}: Return ~ from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.", "flavor_text": null, "power": "4", "toughness": "3", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Rakdos build-around rare that combines black's sacrifice themes with red's aggressive haste. The optional sacrifice provides meaningful choice - trade resources for immediate power. The recursive ability creates inevitability and rewards aggressive play that gets it killed. 4/3 haste for 5 is below rate, but the abilities provide significant upside."}, {"name": "Wayfarer's Compass", "mana_cost": "{2}", "cmc": 2, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}: Scry 1.", "flavor_text": "It points not to magnetic north, but to the path your heart desires most.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple colorless mana rock at common with utility. The scry ability provides card selection at a fair cost - more expensive than pure mana rocks but offers long-term value. This design gives any deck access to mana fixing and card quality improvement, fitting common's accessibility requirements."}, {"name": "Chronarch's Nexus", "mana_cost": "{4}", "cmc": 4, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Artifact", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{3}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library. You may play it this turn.
{7}, {T}, Sacrifice ~: Take an extra turn after this one.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare", "design_notes": "Complex rare artifact with escalating abilities. Starts as an expensive mana rock, offers card advantage in the midgame, and provides a splashy late-game effect. The extra turn ability requires significant investment and sacrifice, preventing easy abuse. Each ability is appropriately costed for its power level."}, {"name": "Seraph of Divine Judgment", "mana_cost": "{4}{W}{B}", "cmc": 6, "colors": ["W", "B"], "color_identity": ["W", "B"], "type_line": "Legendary Planeswalker — Seraph", "oracle_text": "+1: You gain 2 life and each opponent loses 1 life.
−3: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.
−7: You get an emblem with "Whenever a creature dies, you may return it to the battlefield under your control."", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": "4", "rarity": "mythic", "design_notes": "Orzhov mythic planeswalker that combines white's lifegain with black's life drain and creature control. The +1 provides incremental advantage, the -3 is powerful removal with white-style compensation, and the ultimate creates a game-ending emblem. Starting loyalty of 4 allows immediate -3 use while requiring protection for the ultimate."}]}
